title.ko: 특정 목적의 건축물 또는 유사한 구축물(構築物); 수영(水泳) 또는 물놀이용 수조(水槽) 또는 풀(pool); 마스트(mast); 울타리; 텐트 또는 차양 일반(기초 E02D)
title.en: BUILDINGS OR LIKE STRUCTURES FOR PARTICULAR PURPOSES; SWIMMING OR SPLASH BATHS OR POOLS; MASTS; FENCING; TENTS OR CANOPIES, IN GENERAL (foundations E02D)

definition.ko: 건축물 거주(居住) 또는 사무목적에 대한 것 E04H1/00 공공목적에 대한 것 E04H3/00 공업 또는 농업목적에 대한 것; 주차에 대한 것 E04H5/00; 6/00 수영 또는 물놀이용 수조(水槽) 또는 풀(pool) E04H4/00 용기(容器) E04H7/00 특수한 방호(防護)를 제공하는 건축물 E04H9/00 탑(塔), 마스트, 굴뚝 E04H12/00 기념건조물, 묘(墓) E04H13/00 상이한 목적을 조합한 건축물, 드라이브인(drivein) E04H14/00 텐트, 차양(遮陽) E04H15/00 펜스, 울타리, 가축(家畜)의 우리 E04H17/00

title.ko: 거주(居住) 또는 사무 목적에 대한 건축물 또는 건축물의 그룹; 일반적인 레이아웃, 예. 모듈 코디네이션(modular coordination) 또는 바닥 높이가 서로 다른 것(E04H 3/00이 우선)
title.en: Buildings or groups of buildings for dwelling or office purposes; General layout, e.g. modular co-ordination or staggered storeys   (E04H0003000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 주거(住居); 일반적인 거주(居住)를 위한 건축물 (제한된 업무를 위한 작은 건축물 E04H 1/12)
title.en: Dwelling houses; Buildings for temporary habitation (small erections for limited occupation E04H0001120000)
Apartment houses arranged in two or more levels

title.ko: 사무소 건물; 은행 (E04H1/12가 우선)
title.en: Office buildings; Banks (E04H0001120000 takes precedence)

Small buildings or other erections for limited occupation, erected in the open air or arranged in buildings, e.g. kiosks, waiting shelters for bus stops or for filling stations, roofs for railway platforms, watchmen's huts or dressing cubicles
Telephone cabinets
Buildings or groups of buildings for public or similar purposes; Institutions, e.g. infirmaries or prisons
Hotels; Motels; Coffee-houses; Restaurants; Shops; Department stores
Restaurants or shops having arrangements for self-service
Museums; Library buildings
Hospitals, infirmaries, or the like; Schools; Prisons
for meetings, entertainments, or sports
Tribunes, grandstands or terraces for spectators
Gymnasiums; Other sporting buildings
for swimming
Theatres; Concert halls; Studios for broadcasting, cinematography, television or similar purposes
Constructional features of stages
Revolving stages; Stages able to be lowered
Shiftable or portable platforms
Constructional features of auditoriums
Swimming or splash baths or pools
formed in situ
prefabricated or composed of prefabricated elements
Safety devices; Coverings for baths
Coverings consisting of rigid elements
Coverings of flexible material
Devices or arrangements for circulating water
Parts, details or accessories not otherwise provided for
specially adapted for cleaning

title.ko: 산업용 또는 농업용 건물 또는 건물 그룹
title.en: Buildings or groups of buildings for industrial or agricultural purposes

title.ko: 산업용 건물 또는 건물 그룹, 예. 발전소 또는 공장용 (냉각 플랜트의 일부를 구성하는 건물 E04H5/10)
title.en: Buildings or groups of buildings for industrial purposes, e.g. for power-plants or factories  (buildings forming part of cooling plants E04H0005100000)
Transformer houses; Substations or switchgear houses
Pits or building structures for inspection or services

title.ko: 농업용 건물 또는 건물 그룹 (저장고 E04H7/22)
title.en: Buildings or groups of buildings for agricultural purposes (silos E04H0007220000)
Buildings forming part of cooling plants
Cooling towers

title.ko: 자동차, 철도 차량, 항공기, 선박 또는 이와 유사한 차량을 위한 건물, 예. 차고
title.en: Buildings for parking cars, rolling-stock, aircraft, vessels or like vehicles, e.g. garages

title.ko: 작은 차고, 예. 한 대 또는 두 대의 차량용 (차량에 부착되거나, 차량에 의해 지지되는 것 B62D)
title.en: Small garages, e.g. for one or two cars (attached to, or supported by, the vehicle B62D)
wheeled, hinged, foldable, telescopic, swinging or otherwise movable
with means for shifting or lifting vehicles

title.ko: 많은 승용물을 위한 차고(車庫)
title.en: Garages for many vehicles
without mechanical means for shifting or lifting vehicles, e.g. with helically-arranged fixed ramps, with movable ramps

title.ko: 승용물을 이동 또는 승강하기 위한 기계적 수단을 갖는 것
title.en: with mechanical means for shifting or lifting vehicles
with endless conveyor chains having load-carrying parts moving vertically, e.g. paternoster lifts
Garages shaped as a wheel or drum rotatable about a horizontal axis

title.ko: 수직 방향만 또는 수직과 수평 방향으로 독립하여 운반하는 수단을 갖는 것(E04H 6/14가 우선)
title.en: with means for transport in vertical direction only or independently in vertical and horizontal directions (E04H0006140000 takes precedence)
characterised by use of conveyor chains or rotatable rollers for horizontal transport
characterised by use of movable platforms for horizontal transport
characterised by use of dollies for horizontal transport
characterised by use of tiltable floors or floor sections; characterised by use of movable ramps
characterised by use of turntables or rotary rings for horizontal transport
with means for transport in horizontal direction only
characterised by use of conveyor chains or rotatable rollers
characterised by use of movable platforms
characterised by use of freely-movable dollies
characterised by use of tiltable floors or floor sections
characterised by use of turntables or rotary rings
Devices or arrangements peculiar to garages, not covered elsewhere, e.g. securing devices, safety devices
for storing aircraft

title.ko: 현장에서 또는 별도의 장소에서 토목 공학 기술을 사용하는 대형 저장 용기의 건설 또는 조립(탑(塔)의 형상 12/00; 저장고(貯藏庫)의 형상, 예. 부유(浮游) 지붕, 밀봉(密封) 수단, 충전 또는 방출 수단 B65D, B65G, F17B, F17C; 기초 E02D 27/38)
title.en: Construction or assembling of bulk storage containers employing civil engineering techniques in situ or off the site (tower aspects E04H0012000000;storage aspects, e.g. floating roofs, sealing means, filling or discharging means B65D, B65G, F17B, F17C;foundations E02D0027380000)
Containers for fluids or gases; Supports therefor
mainly of metal
with vertical axis
ball-shaped
with horizontal axis
mainly of concrete, e.g. reinforced concrete, or other stone-like material
Prestressed constructions
Containers for fluent solids, e.g. silos or bunkers; Supports therefor
Constructions, with or without perforated walls, depending on the use of specified materials
mainly of concrete, e.g. reinforced concrete, or other stone-like material
composed of special building elements
mainly of metal
mainly of wood

title.ko: 비정상적인 외부 영향을 견디거나 보호를 제공하는데 적합한 건물, 건물 그룹 또는 대피소, 예. 전쟁과 같은 행위, 지진 또는 극한 기후 (기초 측면 E02D)
title.en: Buildings, groups of buildings or shelters adapted to withstand or provide protection against abnormal external influences, e.g. war-like action, earthquake or extreme climate   (foundation aspects E02D)

title.ko: 지진 또는 지반 침하(沈下)에 견디는 것(기초 E02D 27/34)
title.en: withstanding earthquake or sinking of ground (foundations E02D0027340000)
against air-raid or other war-like actions
Structures arranged in, or forming part of, buildings
Structures arranged underneath buildings, e.g. air-raid shelters
Independent shelters; Arrangement of independent splinter-proof walls
entirely underneath the level of the ground, e.g. air-raid galleries
against other dangerous influences, e.g. tornadoes, floods
against adverse conditions, e.g. extreme climate, pests

title.ko: 탑(塔); 마스트(기둥) 또는 폴(Pole); 굴뚝; 급수 탑(塔); 그러한 구조물을 건조하는 방법 (냉각탑(冷却塔) E04H5/12; 석유 채굴의 망루(derrick) E21B15/00)
title.en: Towers; Masts or poles; Chimney stacks; Water-towers; Methods of erecting such structures (cooling towers E04H0005120000;derricks for oil drilling E21B0015000000)
Structures made of specified materials
of wood
Truss-like structures
of metal
Truss-like structures
of concrete or other stone-like material, with or without internal or external reinforcement, e.g. with metal coverings, with permanent form elements
Truss-like structures
Prestressed structures
movable or with movable sections, e.g. rotatable or telescopic
Side-supporting means therefor, e.g. using guy ropes or struts
Sockets or holders for poles or posts
Cross-arms
Winding towers for mines

title.ko: 굴뚝, 예. 자립하는 것, 또는 유사한 덕트 (건축물의 부분으로서의 굴뚝 E04F17/02)
title.en: Chimney stacks, e.g. free-standing, or similar ducts (chimneys as part of buildings E04F0017020000)
Water-towers
Flagpoles
Arrangements for erecting or lowering towers, masts, poles, chimney stacks, or the like
Monuments; Tombs; Burial vaults; Columbaria

title.ko: 이 서브클래스의 메인 그룹1/00으로부터13/00의 어느 것에도 포함 되지 않는, 다종의 복합 목적을 가진 건축물, 예.이중 목적을 가진 것(3/02, 9/06이 우선); 드라이브인 형식의 건축물
title.en: Buildings for combinations of different purposes not covered by any single one of main groups E04H0001000000-E04H0013000000 of this subclass, e.g. for double purpose (E04H0003020000, E04H0009060000 take precedence); Buildings of the drive-in type

title.ko: 텐트 또는 차양(遮陽) 일반
title.en: Tents or canopies, in general
Tents combined or specially associated with other devices
suspended type, e.g. from trees or from cantilever supports
Tents at least partially supported by vehicles
Trailer awnings or the like
Heating, lighting or ventilating
Heating
Ventilating
of tent roofs

title.ko: 복수개의 구획 커버를 갖고 있는 텐트, 예. 파빌리온(pavilion), 둥근 천정 형상의 텐트, 대천막(大天幕), 서커스용 텐트(팽창 가능한 것 15/20); 복수개로 되는 텐트, 예. 모듈(modular) 형식
title.en: Tents having plural sectional covers, e.g. pavilions, vaulted tents, marquees, circus tents (inflatable E04H0015200000); Plural tents, e.g. modular
inflatable, e.g. shaped, strengthened or supported by fluid pressure
supported by air pressure inside the tent
cone shaped, e.g. teepees

title.ko: 중앙 지주(center pole)로 지지된 텐트(우산(雨傘) 형식의 것 15/28)
title.en: Center-pole supported tents (umbrella type E04H0015280000)
Umbrella type tents
convertible, e.g. from one type tent to another type tent, from tent to canopy or from tent cover into diverse articles

title.ko: 텐트에 특히 적합한 부품, 구성요소, 구조체의 세부, 부속품, 내부 비품, 예. 버팀 장치, 스커트(skirt) , 출입구
title.en: Parts, components, construction details, accessories, interior equipment, specially adapted for tents, e.g. guy-line equipment, skirts, thresholds

title.ko: 지지 수단, 예. 프레임
title.en: Supporting means, e.g. frames

title.ko: 아치 형식의 것(E04H 15/42가 우선)
title.en: arch-shaped type (E04H0015420000 takes precedence)
expansible, e.g. extensible
flexible
external type, e.g. frame outside of cover

title.ko: 절첩될 수 있는 것, 예. 분할 형식의 것 (E04H15/42가 우선)
title.en: collapsible, e.g. breakdown type (E04H0015420000 takes precedence)
telescoping and foldable

title.ko: 접히는 형식의 것, 즉 피봇 또는 힌지 수단을 갖는 것(15/46이 우선)
title.en: foldable, i.e. having pivoted or hinged means (E04H0015460000 takes precedence)
lazy-tongs type
parallelogram type
Covers of tents or canopies
Floors
Closures; Awnings; Sunshades
Poles
Pegs, stakes or the like
Tent or canopy cover fastenings

title.ko: 울타리, 예. 펜스(fence), 담, 가축의 우리(전기책에 대한 특유한 형상 A01K 3/00, H05C; 펜스, 장애물 또는 유사물이 빠져나가는 것을 가능케 하는 수단 E06B 11/00)
title.en: Fencing, e.g. fences, enclosures, corrals (features peculiar to electrified fences A01K0003000000, H05C;means for allowing passage through fences, barriers, or the like E06B0011000000)

title.ko: 철사 펜스, 예. 철망으로 만든 것 (E04H17/14가 우선)
title.en: Wire fencing, e.g. made of wire mesh (E04H0017140000 takes precedence)
characterised by the use of specially adapted wire, e.g. barbed wire
Parts for wire fences
Anchoring means therefor, e.g. specially-shaped parts entering the ground; Struts or the like
characterised by the way of connecting wire to the posts; Droppers
the wire being placed in slots, grooves, or the like
Fences constructed of rigid elements, e.g. with additional wire fillings or with posts
using prefabricated panel-like elements, e.g. wired frames
Corrals, i.e. easily transportable or demountable enclosures
Posts therefor
Anchoring means therefor, e.g. specially-shaped parts entering the ground; Struts or the like
Connections for attaching additional wire to frames, posts or railings
Devices for erecting or removing fences
